article.title: Hitron DOCSIS, PON and FWA gateways clear FCC's router ban
article.summary: A handful of devices from Hitron Americas, including DOCSIS 4.0, XGS-PON and FWA gateways, have received temporary exemptions from the FCC's ban on foreign-made consumer routers.
article.title_zh: Hitron DOCSIS、PON 和 FWA 網關通過 FCC 路由器禁令審查
article.summary_zh: Hitron Americas 的多款設備，包括 DOCSIS 4.0、XGS-PON 和 FWA 網關，已獲得 FCC 外製消費級路由器禁令的臨時豁免。

article.title: Anthropic launches Claude Tag enterprise collaborative tool for agentic workflows
article.summary: No sign of Claude Fable 5’s return yet, though Anthropic does have a new Claude feature launching today. Claude Tag is “a new way for teams to work with Claude,” per Anthropic.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag 企業協作工具，支持智能代理工作流
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出新的 Claude Tag 功能，為團隊提供與 Claude 協作的新方式。

article.title: Nokia and Google Cloud are embedding Gemini AI agents into network operations software
article.summary: Six specialized Nokia agents will roll out through 2027 In sum – what we know: Google Cloud and Nokia have expanded their partnership to push Gemini-powered AI agents directly into Nokia’s network operations software, with the integration centered on the Nokia Assurance…
article.title_zh: Nokia 和 Google Cloud 將 Gemini AI 代理嵌入網路運營軟體
article.summary_zh: Google Cloud 和 Nokia 擴展合作，將 Gemini 驅動的 AI 代理直接集成到 Nokia 網路運營軟體中，並計畫於 2027 年前推出六個專門的 Nokia 代理。

article.title: Meta’s rumored Polymarket rival wants you to literally bet on the future
article.summary: TL;DR Meta is reportedly developing a standalone prediction app called Arena, where users would compete for points and rankings rather than wager real money. The project marks Meta’s second attempt at prediction-based platforms, following the earlier shutdown of its Forecast app, but it arrives as prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi are booming. Arena is still under development and may never launch, but the reported project has already attracted criticism from lawmakers concerned about Meta’s growing focus on engagement-driven products. The internet has always loved making predictions. Whether it’s guessing who will win an election or which team will lift a trophy, people enjoy putting their confidence behind a forecast and seeing if they’re right. Over the past few years, that h
article.title_zh: Meta傳言中的Polymarket競爭對手希望你實際上預測未來
article.summary_zh: Meta正開發一款名為Arena的獨立預測應用程式，用戶可競爭排名而非下注真實金錢，這是Meta在關閉Forecast應用後的第二次嘗試。

article.title: Nokia combines with AWS and Databricks to extend telco AI control layer
article.summary: Telco vendors are rushing agentic AI into OSS and BSS stacks – hard, at DTW Ignite this week. Nokia has just announced work with AWS and Databricks to build the data, cloud, and control layers for autonomous networks. In sum…
article.title_zh: Nokia 與 AWS 和 Databricks 聯合擴展電信 AI 控制層
article.summary_zh: 電信供應商正在 OSS 和 BSS 堆棧中快速部署代理 AI——本週在 DTW Ignite 大會上有重要進展。Nokia 剛宣布與 AWS 和 Databricks 的合作，以建立自主網路的數據、雲端和控制層。

article.title: Samsung teases twice-as-fast UFS 5.0 storage for future ‘flagship smartphones’
article.summary: Samsung has announced a new UFS 5.0 storage solution that’s twice as fast as existing options, and coming to future “flagship smartphones.”
article.title_zh: Samsung 展示速度提升兩倍的 UFS 5.0 儲存方案，用於未來旗艦智能手機
article.summary_zh: Samsung 推出新 UFS 5.0 儲存方案，速度提升兩倍，將搭載於未來旗艦智能手機。

article.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
article.summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Claude Tag 正在逐則 Slack 訊息了解你的公司
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出的新 Claude Tag 為 Slack 帶來了常駐 AI 隊友，除了提升生產力外，這項功能還是捕捉組織背景、機構知識和企業工作流程的戰略舉措。

article.title: Qualcomm Buys Buzzy Chip Startup Modular for Nearly $4 Billion
article.summary: Modular, one of the most promising chip software startups of the AI era, heads for a multibillion-dollar exit.
article.title_zh: 高通以近 40 億美元收購熱門晶片新創公司 Modular
article.summary_zh: Modular 是 AI 時代最有前景的晶片軟體新創公司之一，即將實現數十億美元的退出。

article.title: OpenAI, Broadcom Unveil Chip to Run Models Faster, Cheaper
article.summary: OpenAI unveiled its first custom artificial intelligence chip developed in partnership with Broadcom Inc., part of a bid by the ChatGPT maker to gain an edge by tailoring hardware to better run its AI products.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 與 Broadcom 推出芯片以更快更廉價地運行模型
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出與 Broadcom Inc. 合作開發的首款定制人工智能芯片，旨在通過定制硬件更好地運行其 AI 產品。

article.title: Lingyi iTech Raises $1.1 Billion With Shares Priced at Maximum
article.summary: China’s Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. raised HK$8.3 billion ($1.1 billion) after pricing its Hong Kong listing at the maximum price, with strong investor demand leading the company to reject more than 100 orders, according to people familiar with the matter.
article.title_zh: 凌雲智能以最高價格融資 11 億美元
article.summary_zh: 中國凌雲智能廣東公司以最高價格香港上市融資 83 億港元（11 億美元），投資者需求強勁導致公司拒絕了逾 100 份認購。

article.title: Instagram now supports using Google Cast to watch Reels on your TV
article.summary: Rolling out now, the Instagram app has added support for watching Reels on your TV using Google Cast.
article.title_zh: Instagram 現已支援使用 Google Cast 在電視上觀看 Reels
article.summary_zh: Instagram 應用現已新增支援使用 Google Cast 在電視上觀看 Reels 的功能。
